info.title: Lead Service
info.description: Manages lead buffering, deduplication, cursor pagination, and enrichment for campaign outreach.

found.description: True when a lead was claimed and returned. False when no lead can be served right now.

reason.description: Optional reason when found=false. credit_insufficient means the org has no available platform credits, so no paid enrichment/search/LLM action was performed.

BufferNextResponse.description: Response from POST /orgs/buffer/next. When found is true, lead contains the served lead with full canonical FullLead payload under `lead.data`.

leadId.description: Internal lead UUID. Same as data.leadId — kept at the top level for backwards compatibility with workflow scripts that read it directly.

email.description: The email address selected for outreach. Always populated when found=true. Same address appears in data.contacts for the 'email' channel.

brandIds.description: Brand UUIDs this lead was buffered for (echoed back from x-brand-id header).

orgId.description: Internal organization UUID owning the campaign.

userId.description: Internal user UUID who triggered the campaign run.

apolloPersonId.description: Apollo person ID — same value as data.apolloPersonId.

goal.description: Explicit active goal tag for this served lead. null means unattributed.

activeGoalId.description: Explicit active goal ID tag for this served lead. null means unattributed.

brandProfileId.description: Explicit brand profile ID tag for this served lead. null means unattributed.

customerPersonaId.description: Explicit customer persona ID tag for this served lead. null means unattributed.

customerProfileId.description: Explicit customer profile ID tag for this served lead. null means unattributed.

ServedLead.description: A single lead served from the campaign buffer. The full lead payload lives under `data` (FullLead shape).

leadId.description: Internal lead UUID (lead-service registry). Stable across enrichment refreshes.

apolloPersonId.description: Apollo person ID — present when the lead was sourced or enriched via Apollo.

firstName.description: Lead's first name. Required — lead-service refuses to register a lead without one. Use this for recipientFirstName on outbound email.

lastName.description: Lead's last name. Required. Use this for recipientLastName on outbound email.

name.description: Full display name as provided by source (often 'firstName lastName' but not always).

headline.description: Lead's professional headline / current role line (e.g. LinkedIn-style headline).

enrichedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last successful enrichment. null when the lead was registered without enrichment.

currentTitle.description: Lead's current role title — derived from the leads_organizations row where current=true. Mirrors `employmentHistory[].title` for the current entry; surfaced top-level for convenient template binding (e.g. `recipientTitle` on outbound email). null when the lead has no current employment row or the row has no title.

contacts.description: All contact methods attached to this lead — email, phone, etc. May be empty.

employmentHistory.description: Full employment history (current + past). Returned in insertion order; check the `current` flag to find the present role.

FullLead.description: Canonical lead representation returned by every lead-bearing endpoint. Built entirely from structured columns — there is no `metadata` or `raw` Apollo passthrough. Field names are stable regardless of upstream enrichment provider.

organization.name: Casco Bay
organization.shortDescription: Boutique digital marketing agency in Portland, ME.
organization.seoDescription: Casco Bay is a boutique digital marketing agency based in Portland, Maine.

apolloOrganizationId.description: Apollo organization ID — present when sourced from Apollo enrichment.

name.description: Company name as registered. Use this for recipientCompany on outbound email.

primaryDomain.description: Primary domain of the company (no protocol). Useful for domain-level deliverability or matching.

annualRevenue.description: Annual revenue (USD), serialized as a numeric string to avoid float precision loss for very large companies.

shortDescription.description: Short marketing-style description of the company.
shortDescription.example: Boutique digital marketing agency in Portland, ME.

state.description: Company HQ state / province (ISO subdivision when available).

technologyNames.description: Technologies the company is known to use (e.g. 'GA4', 'Salesforce').

industries.description: All industry classifications attached to this company.

latestFundingStage.description: Most recent funding stage label as reported by Apollo (e.g. 'seed', 'series_a', 'series_b'). null when never funded or unknown.

latestFundingRoundDate.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the most recent funding round. null when unknown.

totalFunding.description: Total funding raised, in USD, serialized as a numeric string to avoid float precision loss for very large amounts.

fundingEvents.description: Per-round funding history. Empty array when no funding events are known. Apollo's snake_case `news_url` is mapped to camelCase `newsUrl` for API consistency.

retailLocationCount.description: Number of physical retail locations the organization operates.

publiclyTradedSymbol.description: Stock ticker symbol when the company is publicly traded. null for private companies.

publiclyTradedExchange.description: Stock exchange where the company is listed (e.g. 'NASDAQ', 'NYSE'). null for private companies.

primaryPhone.description: Primary phone number for the company (E.164 when available).

seoDescription.description: Long-form SEO meta description scraped from the company's website. Distinct from `shortDescription` (which is editorial / Apollo-curated).
seoDescription.example: Casco Bay is a boutique digital marketing agency based in Portland, Maine.

numSuborganizations.description: Count of subsidiaries / sub-organizations associated with this company.

alexaRanking.description: Alexa global website rank (smaller = more popular). null when unranked.

keywords.description: Free-form keywords that describe the company (Apollo-curated).

OrganizationView.description: Snapshot of the lead's CURRENT employer organization, joined from leads_organizations where current=true. All fields are nullable because organization enrichment is best-effort. null at the parent level means the lead has no current employment record.

example.name: Casco Bay
example.shortDescription: Boutique digital marketing agency in Portland, ME.
example.seoDescription: Casco Bay is a boutique digital marketing agency based in Portland, Maine.

id.description: Apollo-assigned identifier for the funding event.

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the funding event.

investors.description: Comma-separated list of investors as reported by Apollo.

amount.description: Amount raised in this round, in the round's currency.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the amount.

newsUrl.description: URL to a news article announcing this funding event. Mapped from Apollo's snake_case `news_url` to camelCase for consistency with the rest of the API surface.

FundingEvent.description: One funding round attached to an organization. All fields are nullable because Apollo's coverage is best-effort.

channel.description: Contact channel kind. Currently used: 'email', 'phone'. Stable identifier — case-sensitive.

value.description: Contact value (the actual email address, phone number, etc.). Unique per (leadId, channel).

status.description: Provider-reported status of the contact value (e.g. 'verified', 'unverified', 'extrapolated' for emails). null when not classified.

ContactMethodView.description: One contact endpoint attached to a lead — email, phone, or any other channel. Multiple rows per lead are possible.

organizationId.description: Internal organization UUID for this employment row.

organizationName.description: Organization name at time of join. May differ from current name if company was renamed.

title.description: Role title held during this employment.

startDate.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this employment started. null when unknown.

endDate.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this employment ended. null when current or unknown.

current.description: True when this is the lead's current employment.

EmploymentEntryView.description: One employment row from the lead's career history. All rows from leads_organizations are returned (past + current).

provider.description: Lead provider to source through the human-service people gateway. 'apollo' (rich search + reveal) or 'apify' (verified-email waterfall). Omitted = apollo (today's behavior, preserved for existing callers).

leads.description: All leads_campaigns rows matching the query, with full canonical lead payload + delivery overlay.

id.description: leads_campaigns row UUID (per-campaign per-lead lifecycle row, NOT the lead itself).

leadId.description: Internal lead UUID. Null only when the row references a lead that was deleted.

namespace.description: Namespace this lead was sourced from. Currently always 'apollo'.

email.description: The email address tied to this leads_campaigns row.

status.description: Lead lifecycle status in this campaign. 'buffered'/'skipped'/'claimed'/'served' all live in leads_campaigns; 'served' = pulled and served to a workflow.

statusReason.description: Why this lead is in its current status (e.g. 'already_contacted', 'bounced'). Set for skipped/buffered leads.

statusDetails.description: Human-readable details about the status reason.
statusDetails.example: Lead was contacted in campaign abc-123 on 2026-01-01.

parentRunId.description: Run ID of the workflow that pulled / processed this lead.

runId.description: Run ID for the campaign-tick that produced this lead.

brandIds.description: Brand UUIDs this lead was buffered for.

campaignId.description: Campaign ID owning this leads_campaigns row.

userId.description: Internal user UUID who triggered the campaign run.

workflowSlug.description: Workflow slug that processed this lead (e.g. 'sales-cold-email-outreach-helium').

goal.description: Explicit active goal tag stored on the leads_campaigns row. null means unattributed.

activeGoalId.description: Explicit active goal ID stored on the leads_campaigns row. null means unattributed.

brandProfileId.description: Explicit brand profile ID stored on the leads_campaigns row. null means unattributed.

customerPersonaId.description: Explicit customer persona ID stored on the leads_campaigns row. null means unattributed.

customerProfileId.description: Explicit customer profile ID stored on the leads_campaigns row. null means unattributed.

servedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this lead was served. null for buffered/skipped/claimed rows.

apolloPersonId.description: Apollo person ID — convenience copy of lead.apolloPersonId.

emailStatus.description: Email verification status from Apollo (verified, unverified, extrapolated, etc.).

contacted.description: Lead has been contacted at least once in this scope (campaign or brand depending on query).

sent.description: An email send has been attempted.

opened.description: Lead has opened at least one email.

clicked.description: Lead has clicked at least one tracked link.

replied.description: Whether the lead replied (any reply, regardless of sentiment).

replyClassification.description: Classification of the most recent reply from email-gateway. 'positive' = interested or willing to meet, 'negative' = not interested, 'neutral' = ambiguous or informational. null when no reply detected.

lastDeliveredAt.description: ISO timestamp of the last delivered message in this scope.

bounced.description: Lead has bounced anywhere across the platform.

unsubscribed.description: Lead has unsubscribed anywhere across the platform.

global.description: Global-scope status (across all brands/campaigns). bounced and unsubscribed are global flags.

LeadDetail.description: One leads_campaigns row enriched with the full canonical lead payload (FullLead) and delivery status from email-gateway.

memberships.description: Distinct (orgId, brandId, workflowSlug) tuples from leads_campaigns whose feature_slug matches the requested feature(s). Empty array when no matches.

orgId.description: Internal organization UUID owning the leads.

workflowSlug.description: Workflow slug that produced leads for this (org, brand) under the requested feature.

FeatureMembership.description: One distinct (org, brand, workflow) combination that has leads for a requested feature.

apiKey.name: x-api-key
apiKey.description: API key for authenticating requests. Must match the LEAD_SERVICE_API_KEY env var on the server.

post.summary: Pull the next lead from the buffer
post.description: Claims and returns the next available lead from the campaign buffer. Response contains the full canonical lead payload (FullLead) under `lead.data` — use `data.firstName`, `data.lastName`, `data.organization.name` for outbound recipient fields.

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: API key for authenticating requests

parameters.name: x-org-id
parameters.description: Internal organization UUID from client-service

parameters.name: x-user-id
parameters.description: Internal user UUID from client-service

parameters.name: x-run-id
parameters.description: The caller's run ID (used as parentRunId when creating this service's own run)

parameters.name: x-campaign-id
parameters.description: Campaign identifier (auto-injected by workflow-service)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand identifier(s), comma-separated for multi-brand campaigns (auto-injected by workflow-service). Example: uuid1,uuid2,uuid3

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug (auto-injected by workflow-service)

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (propagated through the call chain)

parameters.name: x-goal
parameters.description: Active goal enum/name for the campaign activity, when explicitly tagged by the caller.

parameters.name: x-active-goal-id
parameters.description: Active goal identifier for the campaign activity, when explicitly tagged by the caller.

parameters.name: x-brand-profile-id
parameters.description: Brand profile identifier for persona-scoped attribution, when explicitly tagged by the caller.

parameters.name: x-customer-persona-id
parameters.description: Customer persona identifier for persona-scoped attribution, when explicitly tagged by the caller.

parameters.name: x-customer-profile-id
parameters.description: Customer profile identifier for persona-scoped attribution, when explicitly tagged by the caller.

200.description: Next lead from buffer (or found=false when exhausted)

get.summary: List leads with full enrichment and delivery status
get.description: Returns leads_campaigns rows. Each row includes the full canonical lead payload (FullLead — see schema) under `lead`, plus delivery status (contacted, sent, delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, unsubscribed, replied, replyClassification, lastDeliveredAt, global). Delivery status is fetched from email-gateway when brandId or campaignId is provided. With campaignId: campaign-scoped status. With brandId only: brand-scoped (cross-campaign). Without either: status fields default to false/null.

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: API key for authenticating requests

parameters.name: x-org-id
parameters.description: Internal organization UUID from client-service

parameters.name: x-user-id
parameters.description: Internal user UUID from client-service

parameters.name: x-run-id
parameters.description: The caller's run ID (used as parentRunId when creating this service's own run)

parameters.name: x-brand-id
parameters.description: Brand identifier(s), comma-separated for multi-brand campaigns (auto-injected by workflow-service). Example: uuid1,uuid2,uuid3

parameters.name: x-workflow-slug
parameters.description: Workflow slug (auto-injected by workflow-service)

parameters.name: x-feature-slug
parameters.description: Feature slug for tracking (propagated through the call chain)

parameters.name: x-goal

parameters.name: x-brand-profile-id

parameters.name: x-customer-persona-id

parameters.description: Customer profile identifier for persona-scoped attribution, when explicitly tagged by the caller.

parameters.name: workflowSlug
parameters.description: Restrict returned leads to those whose leads_campaigns row has workflow_slug = <value>. When absent, behavior + response shape are unchanged.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Per-lead payload size. `basic` returns a slim `lead` object (firstName, lastName, name, headline, linkedinUrl, photoUrl, apolloPersonId + organization {id, name, logoUrl, primaryDomain, websiteUrl}); drops employmentHistory, funding events, and the extra organization columns. Absent or any other value => the full FullLead payload (default, backward-compatible). Use `basic` for list views to cut the response ~10x.

200.description: List of leads with full canonical payload + delivery overlay

get.description: Returns lead stats with outreach status from email-gateway. totalLeads = served leads count, byOutreachStatus = full recipientStats (contacted, sent, delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, unsubscribed, replies*), repliesDetail = granular reply breakdown, buffered/skipped = buffer counts. When filtering or grouping by goal/profile/persona attribution fields, lead-service joins explicit leads_campaigns tags to recipient-level email-gateway evidence. Untagged rows stay unattributed and do not produce persona/profile groups.

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: API key for authenticating requests

parameters.name: x-org-id
parameters.description: Internal organization UUID from client-service

parameters.name: runIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of run IDs

parameters.name: workflowSlug
parameters.description: Filter by exact workflow slug (single value)

parameters.name: workflowSlugs
parameters.description: Filter by multiple workflow slugs (comma-separated). Takes priority over workflowSlug.

parameters.name: featureSlug
parameters.description: Filter by exact feature slug (single value)

parameters.name: featureSlugs
parameters.description: Filter by multiple feature slugs (comma-separated). Takes priority over featureSlug.

parameters.name: workflowDynastySlug
parameters.description: Filter by workflow dynasty slug. Resolved to all versioned slugs via workflow-service, then filtered with WHERE IN (...). Takes priority over workflowSlug.

parameters.name: featureDynastySlug
parameters.description: Filter by feature dynasty slug. Resolved to all versioned slugs via features-service, then filtered with WHERE IN (...). Takes priority over featureSlug.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: Filter stats to rows explicitly tagged with this active goal.

parameters.name: activeGoalId
parameters.description: Filter stats to rows explicitly tagged with this active goal ID.

parameters.name: brandProfileId
parameters.description: Filter stats to rows explicitly tagged with this brand profile ID.

parameters.name: customerPersonaId
parameters.description: Filter stats to rows explicitly tagged with this customer persona ID.

parameters.name: customerProfileId
parameters.description: Filter stats to rows explicitly tagged with this customer profile ID.

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Group stats by this dimension. When set, returns { groups: [...] } instead of flat stats. Persona/profile groupings are explicit-only: null attribution rows are omitted, not assigned to an unknown persona.

200.description: Lead stats with outreach status. Without groupBy: flat response with totalLeads, byOutreachStatus, repliesDetail, buffered, skipped. With groupBy: grouped stats array.

post.summary: Transfer a solo-brand from one org to another
post.description: Updates org_id on all rows that reference exactly this one brand (solo-brand). Co-branding rows (multiple brand IDs) are skipped. Idempotent — running twice is a no-op.

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: API key for authenticating requests

parameters.name: x-run-id
parameters.description: Idempotency key — replaying with the same x-run-id returns the cached response

get.summary: List distinct (org, brand, workflow) combinations that have leads for a feature
get.description: Returns the DISTINCT (orgId, brandId, workflowSlug) tuples from leads_campaigns whose feature_slug matches the requested feature(s). featureSlugs is comma-separated and matched exactly (feature slugs are not versioned). brandId is unnested from brand_ids[]. Rows with a null workflow_slug are excluded. Empty array when no matches. Auth: x-api-key only.

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: API key for authenticating requests

parameters.name: featureSlugs
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of feature slugs to resolve memberships for.

200.description: Distinct (org, brand, workflow) memberships for the requested feature(s)
